meta.summary: Fast protein structure search, clustering, and multimer comparison for PDB/mmCIF structure datasets.
meta.description: Fast protein structure search, clustering, and multimer comparison for PDB/mmCIF structure datasets.

test: for module in easy-cluster easy-rbh easy-multimersearch easy-multimercluster convertalis convert2pdb createmultimerreport createindex createclusearchdb; do foldseek "$module" 2>&1 | grep -F "usage: foldseek $module" >/dev/null || exit 1; done

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-foldseek-search/query /tmp/taf-foldseek-search/target && cd /tmp/taf-foldseek-search && make_pdb() { out="$1"; gawk 'BEGIN { atom=1; for (i=1; i<=20; i++) { x=i*3.8; printf "ATOM  %5d  N   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           N
", atom++, i, x, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  CA  ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+1.5, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  C   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+2.5, 1, 0; } print "TER"; print "END" }' > "$out"; }; make_pdb query/q1.pdb && cp query/q1.pdb target/t1.pdb && foldseek easy-search query/q1.pdb target result.m8 tmp --threads 1 -s 1.0 >/tmp/taf-foldseek-easy-search.log 2>&1 && test -s result.m8 && grep -F 'q1' result.m8 >/dev/null && grep -F 't1' result.m8 >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-foldseek-cluster/structures && cd /tmp/taf-foldseek-cluster && make_pdb() { out="$1"; gawk 'BEGIN { atom=1; for (i=1; i<=20; i++) { x=i*3.8; printf "ATOM  %5d  N   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           N
", atom++, i, x, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  CA  ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+1.5, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  C   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+2.5, 1, 0; } print "TER"; print "END" }' > "$out"; }; make_pdb structures/s1.pdb && cp structures/s1.pdb structures/s2.pdb && foldseek easy-cluster structures cluster tmp --threads 1 -s 1.0 >/tmp/taf-foldseek-cluster.log 2>&1 && test -s cluster_cluster.tsv && test -s cluster_rep_seq.fasta && test -s cluster_all_seqs.fasta && grep -F 's1' cluster_cluster.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-foldseek-rbh/query /tmp/taf-foldseek-rbh/target && cd /tmp/taf-foldseek-rbh && make_pdb() { out="$1"; gawk 'BEGIN { atom=1; for (i=1; i<=20; i++) { x=i*3.8; printf "ATOM  %5d  N   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           N
", atom++, i, x, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  CA  ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+1.5, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  C   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+2.5, 1, 0; } print "TER"; print "END" }' > "$out"; }; make_pdb query/q1.pdb && cp query/q1.pdb target/t1.pdb && foldseek easy-rbh query/q1.pdb target rbh.m8 tmp --threads 1 -s 1.0 >/tmp/taf-foldseek-rbh.log 2>&1 && test -s rbh.m8 && grep -F 'q1' rbh.m8 >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-foldseek-db/query /tmp/taf-foldseek-db/target && cd /tmp/taf-foldseek-db && make_pdb() { out="$1"; gawk 'BEGIN { atom=1; for (i=1; i<=20; i++) { x=i*3.8; printf "ATOM  %5d  N   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           N
", atom++, i, x, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  CA  ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+1.5, 0, 0; printf "ATOM  %5d  C   ALA A%4d    %8.3f%8.3f%8.3f  1.00 20.00           C
", atom++, i, x+2.5, 1, 0; } print "TER"; print "END" }' > "$out"; }; make_pdb query/q1.pdb && cp query/q1.pdb target/t1.pdb && foldseek createdb query qDB --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-foldseek-createdb-query.log 2>&1 && foldseek createdb target tDB --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-foldseek-createdb-target.log 2>&1 && foldseek search qDB tDB resDB tmp --threads 1 -s 1.0 >/tmp/taf-foldseek-search-db.log 2>&1 && foldseek convertalis qDB tDB resDB res.m8 >/tmp/taf-foldseek-convertalis.log 2>&1 && test -s res.m8 && grep -F 'q1' res.m8 >/dev/null && foldseek convert2pdb tDB out.pdb >/tmp/taf-foldseek-convert2pdb.log 2>&1 && test -s out.pdb && grep -F 'ATOM' out.pdb >/dev/null

upstream.name: Foldseek
upstream.citation: van Kempen et al. 2023; Barrio-Hernandez et al. 2023; Kim et al. 2024
